data.title: A whale withdrew 47,154 SOL from Binance 10 hours ago and pledged it
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale withdrew 47,154 SOL (about 7.98 million US dollars) from Binance 10 hours ago and pledged it. In the past 3 days, the whale has withdrawn a total of 134,482 SOL (about 22.85 million US dollars) from Binance and pledged it.

data.title: Story announces joining the Content Provenance and Authenticity Alliance (C2PA)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Story, a programmable IP public chain, announced that it has joined the Content Provenance and Authenticity Alliance (C2PA), and together with founding members such as Adobe, Arm, BBC, Intel, Microsoft and Truepic, it will promote the standardization of digital media intellectual property rights. By putting IP assets on the chain, Story makes IP verifiable, programmable and licensable, which will further promote the efficient circulation and application of IP in the digital age.

data.title: IP briefly broke through 3.6 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 60.2%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market data shows that IP briefly broke through 3.6 USDT and is currently trading at 3.55 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 60.2%.

data.title: xAI: Grok 3 API to be launched in the coming weeks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official document released by xAI today, in the next few weeks, the API platform will release Grok 3 and Grok 3 mini, providing access to standard and inference models. DeepSearch will also be released to corporate partners through its API. In addition, the official document stated that the training of Grok 3 is in progress and is planned to be updated frequently in the coming months.

data.title: AscendEX will list Pi Network (PI)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Pi Network (PI) at 16:10 on February 20, and open PI/USDT trading pairs.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%.

data.title: Mechanism Cap announces joining ZeusNode Guardian to enhance BTC liquidity on Solana
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Web3 investment company Mechanism Cap announced that it has joined ZeusNode Guardian to promote the BTC-Solana cross-chain infrastructure and promote the unlocking of 1% BTC liquidity on Solana. Mechanism Capital will verify transactions from Bitcoin to Solana. Any ZEUS holder can entrust Guardian to establish a stable and secure network protection. The initial entrustment will start with 500,000 ZEUS, unlocking 25 BTC capacity, and plans to expand to 5 million ZEUS over time.

data.title: Shaoyang County Public Security Bureau cracked a "quick fund" case involving virtual currency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Red Net, the Criminal Investigation Brigade of Shaoyang County Public Security Bureau received a clue about a quick hit of funds. A sum of money involved in fraud was taken out by someone in Wufengpu Town, Shaoyang County. After receiving the clue, the police quickly launched an investigation and arrested a suspect named Wu. After interrogation, Wu confessed to the crime of contacting the fraudulent personnel for the purpose of profit, providing his bank card to collect the fraudulent funds, and illegally exchanging them into virtual currency to transfer to the online criminal suspect. At present, Wu has been detained according to law, and the case is under further investigation.

data.title: If JUP maintains the $0.69 support level, it may rebound to $1
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain analyst Ali posted on the X platform that data shows that if JUP stabilizes above the $0.69 support level, it may rebound back to $1.

data.title: Pi Network Mainnet Launch Today : Live Updates
Cactus Custody Completes SOC 1 Type 1 Certification with Deloitte
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, institutional-level crypto asset custody service provider Cactus Custody announced the completion of SOC 1 Type 1 certification, which fully reflects its pursuit of operations, accurate financial disclosure and top digital asset security, as well as its firm commitment to providing safe and reliable custody solutions for institutional clients.
Independent auditing agency Deloitte conducted a comprehensive review of Cactus Custody's internal control capabilities, covering areas such as customer account opening, fiat currency and digital asset transactions, and internal system operations. The audit results verified Cactus Custody's complete financial processing procedures, including settlement, reconciliation, account management, fee processing, asset valuation, reporting, and full life cycle management of keys under various storage methods.
Cactus Custody will further improve digital asset custody standards and wholeheartedly provide custody solutions with security, compliance and peace of mind as the core.
It is worth mentioning that Cactus Custody has also passed the SOC 2 Type 1 certification conducted by the independent auditing agency Deloitte. The above two certifications show that Cactus Custody has reached industry-leading standards in operational control, data security and financial management.
